scripts.db:migrate: node --env-file=packages/database/.env scripts/check-prisma-migrate-env.mjs && node --env-file=packages/database/.env node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate deploy --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:dev: node --env-file=packages/database/.env scripts/check-prisma-migrate-env.mjs && node --env-file=packages/database/.env node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate dev --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: node --env-file=packages/database/.env scripts/check-prisma-migrate-env.mjs && node --env-file=packages/database/.env node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate deploy --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
